creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 170940
DEPRECATE all www/drupal6-* modules ports

I used Drupal in the past, so I went ahead and made a patch that cleans this up. Didn't include EXPIRATION_DATE because it didn't make much sense to me, since www/drupal6 over a month ago. Please correct me if I'm wrong and I'll resubmit with an EXPIRATION_DATE.

Portlint complains about previous problems, so I ignored it.

The patch includes all www/drupal6-* ports, so I'm requesting maintainer approval from rea@ as some of those are his.

Also, as I'm not sure about the procedure of port removal from the tree, heads up to committers, www/drupal6 expired over a month ago.
